payload.title: Download the discussion materials (pdf)
payload.description: CB6 Transportation Committee handout discussing the Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service project phased approach, 2015 bus lane update, proposed 2017 short-term project, and longer-term capital project.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: New York City Department of Transportation
Metropolitan Transportation Authority

tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
payload.description: Transform Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with faster/more reliable bus service, safer streets for all users, and improved traffic and local conditions. Based on existing Q52/Q53 bus routes. Phased approach: short-term project in 2017 with SBS launch, followed by longer-term capital project.
Select Bus Service route along Woodhaven Blvd and Cross Bay Blvd in Queens. Proposed as part of the Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS project with Q53 SBS. Q52 extension under review.
Select Bus Service route along Woodhaven Blvd and Cross Bay Blvd in Queens. Proposed as part of the Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS project with Q52 SBS.
Important north/south transit corridor carrying over 30,000 daily bus riders in Queens. Vision Zero Priority Corridor between Queens Blvd and 165 Ave.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Boulevard: Dry Harbor Road to Metropolitan Avenue

payload.description: Segment where bus only lanes were installed in August 2015.
DOT installed bus only lanes on Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Ave
Community engagement began and is an important part of project planning
Spring 2015 design workshop
Propose to implement Woodhaven Blvd SBS as a short-term project in 2017 with Q52/53 SBS launch followed by a longer-term project

tool_args.label: Bus only lanes - Woodhaven Blvd Aug 2015

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Ave
payload.description: Bus only lanes on Woodhaven Blvd between Dry Harbor Rd and Metropolitan Ave. In effect Mon-Fri, 7-10am & 4-7pm. Vehicles can enter or cross over a bus lane to make right turns, access a curb cut or driveway within 200', enter a parking space, or quickly drop-off or pick up passengers. Recommendation of the Woodhaven Blvd Congested Corridors Study.
